1437041.text: ⚠️ Important Usage Note: You must switch to "Devin Cloud" mode before using the Claude Opus 4.7 Max and GPT 5.4 XHigh Thinking Fast models. 📷 Please refer to product image #2 for detailed instructions.
You use the email I sent you, then log in using email + verification code, and I will give you the verification code.

Before you start, please note: do not enable the "overage" switch, or your account will be forcibly logged out; this switch is disabled by default.
Hey there, have you run into any issues while using the product? Feel free to reach out anytime if you do.
